analyte: copper mass fraction in a leaded-bronze certified reference material

output_contract.robust_scale: the ERZA-RB1 robust between-laboratory scale s* for the round, in the analyte units, a single number
output_contract.zeta_prime: the ERZA-RB1 zeta-prime performance score for the nominated lab, dimensionless, a single number

decoy_reference.note: Quick classical interlaboratory summary provided for orientation ONLY. This is the naive plain-mean/standard-deviation route and is NOT the ERZA-RB1 answer; do not report these values.
